settings.content:
[format('## Azure Files PoC -- Monitoring Dashboard
This dashboard shows key metrics for the file shares deployed by this PoC. Data sources: Azure Monitor metrics and Log Analytics workspace `{0}`.', variables('lawName'))]

content.Query:
StorageFileLogs
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| summarize RequestCount=count(), Failures=countif(StatusCode >= 400) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| render timechart

StorageFileLogs
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| summarize P50=percentile(DurationMs, 50), P95=percentile(DurationMs, 95), P99=percentile(DurationMs, 99) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| render timechart

StorageFileLogs
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| summarize IngressMB=sum(RequestBodySize)/1048576.0, EgressMB=sum(ResponseBodySize)/1048576.0 by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| render timechart

StorageFileLogs
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| summarize Count=count() by OperationName
| top 10 by Count desc
| render barchart

StorageFileLogs
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h) and StatusCode >= 400
| project TimeGenerated, OperationName, StatusCode, StatusText, Uri, CallerIpAddress
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 100
